title: Planning, Dependencies, and Adaptive Decomposition · Failure Case: Plan User Choice
summary: Plan a migration whose dependencies and risks emerge during work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops plan user choice increment in a dependency-aware adaptive execution plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pause for user direction only when missing authority or a choice materially changes the outcome.
Identify serial dependencies and safe opportunities for parallel work.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
